title: Nidhi-EIR
tagline: Entrepreneurship-in-Residence fellowship for technologists ready to build a company.
funder: DST – National Science & Technology Entrepreneurship Development Board (NSTEDB)
statusNote: Active call — download form and apply.
objectives: Encourage graduating students to take up entrepreneurship by providing support as a fellowship
Provide a prestigious forum for entrepreneurs to pursue ventures without additional risks in technology-based businesses
Make entrepreneurship related to a technology business idea more attractive among available career options
Enable creation of new startups by entrepreneurs and significant progress towards raising funding or investment
targetAudience: First-generation innovative entrepreneurs who have no prior source of income
Individuals who want to embark on an entrepreneurial journey but have no prior entrepreneurial experience
Founders who want to validate an idea before committing significant resources
Aspiring entrepreneurs exploring a business idea alone and looking for co-founders
Those who have been unsuccessful in a prior startup attempt and want to try again using lessons learnt
eligibility: Must have completed 4 years of formal full-time UG/PG education in Science or Engineering — OR — a 3-year degree/diploma in Science or Engineering with at least 2 years of work experience
Must be willing to pursue the business idea under NIDHI EIR full-time (cannot be concurrent with any other remuneration or fellowship)
Must propose one technology business idea with a formal business plan
Must demonstrate the ability to build a scalable technology startup and present an investment proposal
Must be willing to register for the pre-incubation or incubation programme at IC IITP for the entire duration of support
notEligible: You are a promoter or significant shareholder (above 10% shares) of another company at the time of applying or receiving grant approval
You or your team members have previously availed of any NIDHI-EIR grant (EIR support can only be used once across all incubators)
You have received similar grant support previously for the same innovative concept proposed
You or your team members are already supported under NIDHI-PRAYAS or NIDHI-EIR from any incubator
preferences: Technology business ideas with larger technology uncertainties or long gestation periods
Technology business ideas leveraging technology or IP from publicly funded research or academic organisations
Technology business ideas with considerable potential for social impact or job creation
support: Office space and lab access at IC IITP
Access to IC IITP network: investors, corporates, government bodies
Guidance on idea-to-product conversion and business commercialisation
Linkage to follow-on funding schemes post-fellowship
expectedOutcomes: Bring more clarity on the potential for commercialisation of the technology business idea
Develop a business plan for development and commercialisation of the idea
Validate industry, market, technical, and financial feasibility using appropriate methods
Find potential team members and funding sources
Get incubated at IC IIT Patna for product development and commercialisation support, subject to its policies

process.title: Download & Submit Application
process.description: Download the application form. Submit the completed application to nidhieir.ic@iitp.ac.in.

process.title: Screening & Interview
process.description: Applications are reviewed and shortlisted candidates are called for a presentation to the Monitoring Committee. Screening takes 4–8 weeks.

process.title: Fellowship Offer
process.description: Selected fellows receive an offer letter and onboard as Entrepreneurs-in-Residence at IC IITP.

process.title: 12-Month Residency
process.description: Full-time residency at IC IITP. Monthly stipend disbursed subject to progress milestones.

notes: Application to the programme does not guarantee admission.
Received applications will be screened and only shortlisted participants will be notified about the final presentation to the Monitoring Committee.
Screening committee decision for approval and funding support will be final, firm, and binding.
Approved applicants must agree to pre-incubation or incubation at IC IIT Patna as per its policies.
If selected for EIR at IC IITP, you must not take similar support from any other Prayas Centre. IC IIT Patna reserves the right to take appropriate action if found otherwise.
Screening usually takes 4–8 weeks from the application submission end date. No communication from IC IITP within this timeframe may be considered as non-selection.
IC IIT Patna will not provide any suggestion or explanation with regard to applications that are not selected.
about: Nidhi-EIR (Entrepreneur-in-Residence) is a DST-NSTEDB programme that supports promising technologists who want to transition into entrepreneurship. Fellows work full-time on their venture for 12 months at IC IITP, drawing a monthly stipend and leveraging the centre's labs, mentors, and investor network. NIDHI-EIR is part of the National Initiative for Developing and Harnessing Innovations (NIDHI) umbrella, promoted by DST to nurture knowledge-based and technology-driven startups.
